children.label: A
children.text: in the case of grades below chief warrant officer, W–5, have neither (i) failed of selection for promotion to the next higher grade, nor (ii) been removed from a list of warrant officers recommended for promotion to that grade (other than after having been placed on that list after a selection from below the promotion zone); and

children.label: B
children.text: are senior to the warrant officer designated by the Secretary concerned to be the junior warrant officer in the promotion zone eligible for promotion to the next higher grade.

children.label: A
children.text: are eligible for consideration for promotion to the next higher grade;

children.label: B
children.text: are in the same grade as warrant officers in the promotion zone; and

children.label: C
children.text: are senior to the senior warrant officer in the promotion zone.

children.label: A
children.text: are eligible for consideration for promotion to the next higher grade;

children.label: B
children.text: are in the same grade as warrant officers in the promotion zone; and

children.label: C
children.text: are junior to the junior warrant officer in the promotion zone.
The active-duty list referred to in includes the active-duty promotion list established by section 41a of title 14.section 573(b) of this title1See References in Text note below.1
